props.name: imageSrc
props.description: URL or path to the image used for the metallic paint effect. The image is processed internally.

props.name: seed
props.description: Random seed for pattern generation. Different values create different pattern variations.

props.name: scale
props.description: Scale of the metallic pattern. Higher values create more repetitions.

props.name: refraction
props.description: Amount of chromatic aberration (color separation). Creates the rainbow edge effect.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur amount for the pattern transitions. Higher values create softer gradients.

props.name: liquid
props.description: Amount of liquid/wavy animation applied to the pattern.

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation speed multiplier. Set to 0 to disable animation.

props.name: brightness
props.description: Overall brightness of the metallic effect. Values above 1 increase brightness.

props.name: contrast
props.description: Color contrast of the effect. Higher values create more distinct light/dark areas.

props.name: angle
props.description: Rotation angle of the pattern in degrees.

props.name: fresnel
props.description: Fresnel effect intensity. Controls edge highlighting based on viewing angle.

props.name: lightColor
props.description: Hex color for the bright/highlight areas of the metallic effect.

props.name: darkColor
props.description: Hex color for the dark/shadow areas of the metallic effect.

props.name: patternSharpness
props.description: Controls the sharpness of metallic band transitions. Higher = sharper edges.

props.name: waveAmplitude
props.description: Intensity of the wave distortion effect.

props.name: noiseScale
props.description: Scale of the noise pattern. Higher = more detailed noise.

props.name: chromaticSpread
props.description: Multiplier for chromatic aberration spread between RGB channels.

props.name: mouseAnimation
props.description: When true, mouse position controls wave animation instead of auto-loop.

props.name: distortion
props.description: Amount of noise-based distortion applied to the pattern flow (0-1).

props.name: contour
props.description: Intensity of edge contour effect that warps the pattern along shape boundaries (0-1).

props.name: tintColor
props.description: Hex color for color burn tint effect. White = no tint.
